personas.name: The Post-Logo Convert
personas.summary: Former logo-luxury client who has deliberately moved away from visible branding. Bottega is their declaration of a more evolved taste — the absence of a logo is the whole point, and they want that understood.
personas.shopping_behavior: Deliberate and unhurried buyer. Appreciates detailed conversation about leather and construction. Often has a Chanel or LV background and is consciously moving on. Dislikes obvious selling.
personas.trend_receptivity: Intrecciato craft narratives, material and colour stories, understated seasonal updates, pieces that reward close inspection
personas.avoid: Any overt branding or logo moments, trend-forward pieces without craft grounding, high-visibility items

personas.name: The Interior World Client
personas.summary: Architect, interior designer, or product designer who relates to Bottega through its material and spatial intelligence. Treats fashion as an extension of their design sensibility — texture, proportion, and construction are the language.
personas.shopping_behavior: Drawn to woven textures, unusual leathers, and precise construction. Often picks up pieces and examines the inside. Responds to conversation about making processes and material sourcing.
personas.trend_receptivity: Material innovation, new weave interpretations, architectural silhouettes, limited-edition leather treatments
personas.avoid: Trend-led pieces without material story, anything that feels decorative rather than considered, obvious seasonal novelties

personas.name: The Confident Minimalist
personas.summary: High-earning professional who dresses to be taken seriously without dressing to be noticed. Bottega's logoless luxury gives them the confidence of a considered wardrobe without the performance of visible status.
personas.shopping_behavior: Builds a small, deliberate wardrobe. Buys versatile pieces that work across contexts. Asks about longevity and care. Not driven by trends — driven by whether a piece earns its place.
personas.trend_receptivity: Versatile investment pieces, classic BV shapes in seasonal colours, quality and longevity narratives, wardrobe-anchoring items
personas.avoid: Statement pieces that demand attention, highly seasonal items, anything that dates quickly or reads as trend-specific

personas.name: The Knowledgeable Newcomer
personas.summary: Fashion-fluent younger client who has discovered Bottega through the Matthieu Blazy era and sees it as the most intellectually credible luxury brand right now. They've done their research and want the CA to match their knowledge level.
personas.shopping_behavior: Arrives with specific pieces in mind. Follows runway and campaign releases closely. Wants a conversation not a pitch. Often starts with leather goods before building into ready-to-wear.
personas.trend_receptivity: Runway-to-retail pieces, Matthieu Blazy-era design references, craft-forward storytelling, pieces with editorial history
personas.avoid: Generic luxury framing, talking down to their knowledge level, pushing entry-level or obvious pieces when they clearly know the brand
